neighborhoods.name: International Drive (I-Drive)
neighborhoods.reason: Central solo base near Universal and SeaWorld, with walkable dining and attractions.

neighborhoods.name: Lake Buena Vista / Disney Springs
neighborhoods.reason: Closest to Disney's parks, with early-entry perks on-site.

neighborhoods.name: Universal Area
neighborhoods.reason: Walk to Universal and CityWalk — great for thrill-seekers.

neighborhoods.name: Winter Park
neighborhoods.reason: A walkable, upscale historic town 30 minutes north for a local feel.
